highlights.text: As I wrote last Monday (one week ago) at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins under 6857… I t will probably be 6850 trigger.
My lean for today was bulls could run it more.

If government reopens, it could be a “gap and go” scenario to those upside targets instantly without any retrace or pause… My general lean is we put in a big Failed Breakdown of the October 22nd 6690 low, starting a relief rally leg.
My lean as long as those hold we work higher to 6806, 6815, then 6851.” Gap and go it was and we hit 6851 by this afternoon exactly as per the plan.

Last week saw the 2nd largest weekly sell for ES since April with ES spending most the week selling off before bottoming out Friday, putting in a powerful Failed Breakdown around 1:20PM of the October 22nd low, and getting a parabolic rally all day today afterwards.
” Down we went after, but as readers know there is a law in ES: After every elevator down sell comes a face ripping squeeze .
The catch however, is we need to wait for the trigger for these squeezes and they occur only when ES puts in a Failed Breakdown or recovers a previously lost breakdown shelf.
I wrote Thursday at 4pm: “It is much smarter to wait for the Failed Breakdown of the October 22nd 6690 low.
This Failed Breakdown was a macro Failed Breakdown of the 6690 October 22nd low, from which the parabolic late October rally began.
Those new to Failed Breakdowns got a first hand lesson in how powerful they are today.

post_title: SPX Goes Parabolic As Expected, But Can Bulls Maintain The Momentum, Or Pullback Coming? Nov 11th Plan
